task_completion.description: Configure Parking Lot Camera for continuous recording at 25 fps and high quality.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the camera settings or recording schedule for 'Parking Lot Camera'. The schedule grid should be fully selected for all 7 days, the recording type should be set to 'Always' or 'Continuous', the frame rate (FPS) should be set to 25, and the image quality should be set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Configure Entrance Camera for continuous recording at 15 fps and high quality.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the camera settings or recording schedule for 'Entrance Camera'. The schedule grid should be fully selected for all 7 days, the recording type should be set to 'Always' or 'Continuous', the frame rate (FPS) should be set to 15, and the image quality should be set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Configure Server Room Camera for motion-triggered recording at 10 fps and low quality.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the camera settings or recording schedule for 'Server Room Camera'. The schedule grid should be fully selected for all 7 days, the recording type should be set to 'Motion', 'Metadata', or 'Motion + Lo-Res', the frame rate (FPS) should be set to 10, and the image quality should be set to 'Low'.

task_completion.description: Create a monitoring layout named 'Security Operations Center'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a layout tab, view header, or layout list in the UI showing a layout explicitly named 'Security Operations Center'.

task_completion.description: Add all three cameras to the 'Security Operations Center' layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Security Operations Center' layout view. It should display video feeds, panels, or placeholders for exactly three cameras: 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Entrance Camera', and 'Server Room Camera'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nx Witness Web Admin GUI in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigated to https://localhost:7001 with the Nx Witness graphical interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: Settings were applied in the actual application menus.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration should be visible in the proper camera settings dialogs, schedule grids, and layout panels of the VMS, not written in a text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the layout name or camera settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should look standard without the browser's developer console or DOM inspector open and modifying text elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parking Lot Camera: Must be set to 'Always' (continuous) recording, 25 fps, High quality, covering all 7 days. Entrance Camera: Must be set to 'Always' (continuous) recording, 15 fps, High quality, covering all 7 days. Server Room Camera: Must be set to 'Motion' or 'Metadata' triggered recording (NOT continuous), 10 fps, Low quality, covering all 7 days. Layout: Must be exactly named 'Security Operations Center' and contain all three specified cameras.
